chapters.label: Introduction
chapters.intro: Replace the source pile with a path from question to evidence to decision
summary: Start from a decision, not a topic
Make evidence and limits auditable
Deliver a usable next action

scenes.callout: More sources can still leave no next step
Build a contract before the research starts
Research quality is a usable decision

chapters.label: Decision First
chapters.intro: Tie the research to one audience, decision, and usable output
summary: connect the research to one accountable decision and audience
define the deliverable that would make that decision possible
choose research depth from the number of steps and evidence threads required

scenes.callout: Start with who must decide what
Depth must match the decision
A fuzzy question only creates a larger pile
Recap

chapters.label: Research Plan
chapters.intro: Turn the question into scoped sub-questions, sources, and evaluation criteria
summary: decompose the decision into sub-questions that can change the recommendation
bound the research by region, timeframe, population, and exclusions
declare the source strategy and evaluation criteria before collection begins

scenes.callout: Review the plan before expensive work
Bound the question before sources mix
Define how strong sources will be judged
Recap

chapters.label: Evidence Standard
chapters.intro: Make consequential claims traceable and source quality visible
summary: require traceable citations for claims that can change the decision
evaluate source quality instead of treating every link as equal
separate established findings, directional observations, and conflicts

scenes.callout: A citation is not yet a quality judgment
Preserve the strength of each claim
Keep an evidence ledger for audit
Recap

chapters.label: Missing & Limits
chapters.intro: Surface unknowns, contradictions, and confidence before they distort the decision
summary: require a specific account of unknowns, disputes, and data limits
use stop conditions when missing evidence could change the recommendation
state confidence and the evidence that would change it

scenes.callout: What is missing belongs in the result
Missing evidence can require a safe stop
Turn uncertainty into a watch plan
Recap

chapters.label: Research Brief
chapters.intro: Combine six fields into a reusable brief and targeted follow-up loop
summary: package decision, scope, plan, evidence, gaps, and delivery in one brief
make every field change how the research is performed or reviewed
iterate by deepening, validating, or comparing the decisive uncertainty

scenes.callout: A compact contract for decision-ready research
Every field changes research or review
Follow up on the decisive uncertainty
Recap

chapters.label: Summary
chapters.intro: Use the brief to turn evidence into an auditable next action
summary: define the audience, decision, deliverable, scope, and appropriate research depth
plan sub-questions and sources, then require citations, quality checks, and visible conflicts
expose missing evidence and confidence, and deliver the recommendation with its limits and next action

scenes.callout: Use the brief before asking for more depth
